title: Amazing East Java Trip!!! ⛰️
body: We had a wonderful experience joining the 4D3N Ijen Crater, Papuma Beach, Tumpak Sewu Waterfall & Mount Bromo tour from Surabaya. The trip was well organized, smooth, and truly memorable. A special thanks to our tour guide (Fauzi) and driver (Fredi) for their excellent service throughout the journey. Fauzi was very attentive to our needs, ensured we were comfortable and safe at all times, and always went the extra mile to help us. Our driver was also professional, punctual, and made every long journey comfortable and safe. We especially appreciated the effort our guide put into taking beautiful photos and videos for us at every destination. Thanks to him, we captured many unforgettable memories with the amazing views of Ijen, Papuma Beach, Tumpak Sewu, and Mount Bromo. Highly recommended for anyone looking to explore the beauty of East Java with a professional and caring team! May 5, 2026 6 days ago Fauzi and Fredi will be glad to know their attentiveness, professionalism, and support made your journey comfortable and safe. We’re also happy that the photos and videos helped you capture lasting memories of East Java’s landscapes.

title: First time hiking experience
body: First time hiking and guide Kiki and Darry was very friendly and experience and really enjoyed our trip a lot!! They were smooth with their planning and know exactly what to do which makes the entire trip very enjoyable and plesant. Our last day waterfall hike’s tour Sulis was also very nice and experience when bringing us around the waterfall and take great videos and even edited the video for us April 30, 2026 May 5, 2026 Kiki and Darry will be happy to know their friendliness and experience made the trip smooth and pleasant. We’re also pleased that Sulis provided a professional and memorable waterfall experience, including the videos. We appreciate your trust and hope to welcome you again in East Java. Java Volcano Tour Operator

title: We just got back from an incredible…
body: We just got back from an incredible East Java tour with JVTO and we're still buzzing! 4 days, 3 nights of pure magic - Tumpak Sewu, Mount Bromo, and Ijen Crater were breathtaking. Huge shoutout to guide Taufik and driver Joyo - you guys were amazing, made the trip stress-free and super fun 😊. Hotels, food, and the whole expedition exceeded expectations. They were super professional and went above and beyond to make sure everything we asked for was taken care of. Me and my husband are absolutely thrilled and we totally recommend JVTO for an epic, hassle-free adventure! March 31, 2026 May 5, 2026 Taufik and Joyo will be very happy to know their support made your trip stress-free and enjoyable. We truly appreciate your trust and recommendation. Java Volcano Tour Operator

title: Taufik our guide has been great
body: Taufik our guide has been great. Hiked up mount ijen with a 12 and 15 years old in the wee hours of morning. For those with children, you will know it is not easy. Taufik ensure all briefing is always done prior to all trips and flexible with timing. When i wanted to eat local durians, he even we dropped by a well known durian stall to ensure we had it before we left! March 15, 2026 Mar 17, 2026 We’re very happy to hear that you had a great experience with Taufik. He always tries his best to make sure every guest feels well prepared and comfortable during the trip, especially for early hikes like Mount Ijen. It’s great to know you enjoyed the local experience as well, including the durian stop! We truly appreciate you choosing Java Volcano Tour Operator. 🌋

body: Anjas is a professional tour guide! Safe and responsible! title: Amazing trip
body: Had an amazing trip visiting Bromo, Ijen Crater, and Tumpak Sewu Waterfall! Everything was well organized and the price was really good. The staff were super kind and helpful — special thanks to Yandi (our driver who’s been staying with us the whole trip) and Boy (our guide to Ijen crater). They were so friendly and shared lots of useful info. Even though we had to wake up in the middle of the night, it was totally worth it! Highly recommended January 16, 2026 Jan 21, 2026 Java Volcano Tour Operator

title: Fantastic trip
body: The tour guides were extremely friendly and accommodating. One of our friends was injured and they helped him as well. Overall, fantastic planning from the team! body: What an unbelievable experience I don't think there is a better tour guide anywhere than Anjas the personal touch he provides and the knowledge he as over everywhere we went will put this company head and shoulders above the rest. body: JVTO takes pride in assuring their customers by giving them prompt prior information and were quick to answer any questions we had. We had a wonderful time at Ijen today, were blessed with good weather, and Boy took wonderful photos for us and took us to the scenic spots. Both of them were helpful and kind through the whole tour. Your kind words about their helpfulness and photography mean a lot to us, and we will be sure to pass along your compliments to them. Providing clear communication, reliable service, and memorable experiences is always our priority. We’re very happy to know we could deliver that for your trip.

title: Ahboy was a phenomenal Ijen guide from…
body: Ahboy was a phenomenal Ijen guide from start to end. Not only was he incredibly knowledgeable and went out of his way to make sure everything we needed was sorted out (safety, logistics, equipment), he also made sure to build a strong bond with each one of us. Above all, an amazing and fun person to be around and we’re glad he was able to show Ijen to us! October 18, 2025 Oct 18, 2025 We’re truly happy to hear you had such a great experience on the Bromo Ijen Volcano Trip: 3D2N Surabaya – Mount Bromo – Mount Ijen. Ahboy will be thrilled to know that his knowledge, care, and energy made your journey special! 🙌 We hope the memories from Bromo’s sunrise and Ijen’s blue fire stay with you for a long time — and we’d love to welcome you again for another adventure in Java soon! 💚

title: Visiting Mount Ijen
body: Visiting Mount Ijen was such a beautiful experience. We had a great time with our guide Ahboy he was so fun and helpful! title: I recently joined a tour to East Java…
body: I recently joined a tour to East Java with JVTO, and it was absolutely incredible! Our guide, Gufron, and driver, Holili, made the entire trip so comfortable and safe. Gufron was so knowledgeable, friendly, and attentive. He made sure we are safe during the hike and help taking many pictures for us. He also chooses good spots for photos 🤣. Thanks to both of them, we got to see the best of East Java — from sunrise at Mount Bromo to the blue fire of Ijen — all perfectly organized and stress-free. However, keep in mind, ljen can be dangerous when going down to see the blue fire, requiring hiker to be good in shape. It’s sad when we went back to Bali and couldn’t find good tour guide like them. October 8, 2025 Oct 18, 2025 We’re so happy to hear you had an incredible time on the Ultimate Volcano Journey: 3D2N Bali – Mount Ijen – Mount Bromo – Madakaripura Waterfall – Surabaya. Gufron and Holili will be thrilled to know their effort made your trip comfortable, safe, and memorable! 🙏 You captured East Java perfectly — from Bromo’s sunrise to Ijen’s blue fire, it truly is an unforgettable experience. Thank you for the kind words and thoughtful reminder about the Ijen hike 💙 We hope to welcome you back again for another adventure in Java soon!

title: Being a solo traveler it was safe and…
body: Being a solo traveler it was safe and stress free experience with JVTO. The staffs were on time and friendly. Loved the hotels and food recommendations got from the guides. Thank you for the patience and support for the treks! October 7, 2025 Oct 18, 2025 We’re so glad to hear you had a safe and stress-free experience on the Ultimate Volcano Journey: 3D2N Bali – Mount Ijen – Mount Bromo – Madakaripura Waterfall – Surabaya. Our team is truly happy knowing you enjoyed the hotels, food recommendations, and support throughout the treks. Traveling solo takes courage — and we’re honored you chose JVTO to explore East Java with! 🙏 Hope to see you again for another adventure soon.

title: Perfect trip
body: We can only praise the JVTO team, and above all our guide Rendi and our driver Joyo, in the highest terms. We came across JVTO by chance, and looking back, we are incredibly grateful for the great experience and unforgettable memories. From pick-up to support/accompaniment and communication to the spectacular unsolicited photo sessions followed by photo uploads, everything was perfect. We were always kept fully informed about the itinerary, the accommodations we chose were great, and we were always helped with ideas and transportation services when it came to meals. We wish the JVTO team all the best! September 14, 2025 Sep 18, 2025 🔗 https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/packages/surabaya/4d3n/2 It’s wonderful to know that our guide Rendi and driver Joyo made your journey extra special, from their care and communication to the surprise photo sessions that captured your adventure. We truly appreciate your kind words about our team, itinerary, and accommodations.

title: The 4D3N volcano trip is really worth going!!
body: We joined the tour from 31/7 to 3/8. We have had a great trip with our driver, Dika, he was being very helpful and caring, sharing things about Indonesia with us, taking us to different local and good restaurants, and also taking good care of us. He also provided flexibility for us to decide our schedules, I highly appreciate his professionalism!! Besides, for the Ijen tour, our guide, Rendi, also helped us a lot, he kept asking about our condition when we went up the mountain so that we were able to rest at any time. When we went down the steep crater, he held our hands to prevent us from falling. I like his energy that makes our journey so happy and memorable! July 31, 2025 Aug 4, 2025 We’re thrilled to hear that you had such a wonderful 4D3N volcano adventure with us. Dika and Rendi are truly dedicated, and we’re glad their care, energy, and flexibility made your trip smooth, memorable, and joyful. Warmest regards,

title: Ijen and Bromo tour
body: We had such an amazing experience doing Ijen, Mount Bromo and the waterfall. It truly was a once in a lifetime experience. Our driver Johan went above and beyond to help us, he was always in such a happy, positive mood even with the early starts and it really added to the experience. We loved the music he played and couldn’t help but sing along with him to the songs! He was so helpful and a true expert getting us everywhere nice and early and showing us where to go for the best sunrise during Bromo. My husband actually forgot to bring trousers and Johan was quick to let him borrow his and he also gave me his extra jacket at one point to stay warm. I cannot fully express my gratitude for everything Johan did. He is a true asset to your company! I hope one day we can do another tour with him. July 24, 2025 Jul 28, 2025 We’re truly glad to hear that your Ijen, Bromo, and waterfall adventure was such a memorable and once-in-a-lifetime experience. Johan will be so touched to know how much you appreciated his dedication, positivity, and kindness, especially going the extra mile with jackets and even lending his trousers! 😄 He truly is one of our gems, and your kind words mean the world to all of us at JVTO. We’d be honored to have you join us again for another adventure in the future. Until then, we wish you many more incredible travels ahead! Warmest regards,

title: My wife and I did the Java Volcano tour…
body: My wife and I did the Java Volcano tour visiting Ijen with Eboy as our guide. We can't speak highly enough of him he is an excellent guide. From start to finish he made sure we were safe, having fun and told us many interesting facts about Ijen. He was truly fantastic and our experience would not have been the same without him. Would highly recommend to all! July 25, 2025 Jul 25, 2025 We’re delighted to hear that you and your wife had such a fantastic experience with Eboy as your guide at Ijen 🌋 We deeply appreciate your recommendation, and we’d love to welcome you both again on another JVTO adventure in the future ✨ Warmest regards, Team JVTO

title: We did the Java Tour with our guide…
body: We did the Java Tour with our guide Fredy. He was soo friendly and helpful! He made the trip very easy for us. Thank you so much, Fredy! Maybe it would be good to know that the tours are very heavy and also dangerours, for example the climb down Ijen to the blue fire.. July 10, 2025 Jul 15, 2025 And yes, the Ijen descent can be quite challenging, we truly appreciate your honest feedback. Thanks again for choosing JVTO, and we hope to see you again someday! 🙏

title: 3D2N Ijen, Bromo and Madakapuri Waterfall
body: Hello. I would like to give my review for the trip! Overall we are very happy with the service given by the local guide! Freddy our guide and driver was excellent in taking care of us and meeting our needs. He is also fun to talk to, and helped us to take nice photos too. Towards the end, we felt really sad to say goodbye 🥲 Boi, our local guide over at Ijen was amazing. He briefed us on Ijen and throughout the tough difficult trail, he guided us and make sure we are ok. We felt safe with him and we are so so glad he was very patient with us. He is also funny too 😆 Overall the trip was amazing, we loved it. The only feedback we have were the accomodation For the first accommodation, Baratha Hotel, the walls were very thin and the room was too dark. When we were trying to get some rest, the guests next room were making too much noise that we can’t get enough sleep for the Ijen hike 😣 And then when we went to the second accommodation, Joglo Kecombrang, it was not well lit and the walls were too thin. There was a nearby neighbour who was playing loud music and because we were very tired from Ijen, we can’t sleep for Bromo. Worst of all, the water heater was not working so I didn’t shower for that night, making me very cranky and agitated because of the lack of sleep and no water heater. Other than that, the trip, the guides and experience was amazing. Definitely recommended (but with a change in accommodation) June 18, 2025 Jul 7, 2025
